entry.title: New: Bill 133 (2025) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AMENDING THE FISCAL YEAR 2026 BUDGET, OFFICE OF THE MAYOR, ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT PROGRAM, DECREASE THE APPROPRIATION FOR MAKAWAO-PĀʻIA-HAʻIKŪ RESIDENCY AREA CLEAN-UP BY $15,000, AND INCREASE THE APPROPRIATION FOR ALOHA CLASSIC BY $15,000"

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
